title: Magnifica Humanitas
author: theletterf
aiHeadline: The Vatican releases a document on AI, because apparently humanity's butler needs a divine guide to serve us better.

title: California moves to exempt Linux from its age-verification law after backlash
author: rbanffy
aiHeadline: California says Linux doesn't need to comply with its age-verification law, because Linux is too cool for that kind of nonsense.

title: Search engines alternatives now that Google isn't Google anymore
author: elorant
aiHeadline: Google is no longer Google, so now you have to try six other search engines that probably won't work as well, but hey, at least they're different!

title: The Eternal Sloptember
author: razin
aiHeadline: The Eternal Sloptember: because September is the worst month, and now it's eternal, so enjoy the endless slush of bad decisions and regret.

title: Pope Leo XIV says AI must serve humanity, not the powerful few
author: benwerd
aiHeadline: Pope Leo XIV tells AI to serve humanity, not the powerful few, which is great news for the rest of us who aren't powerful and need a break from being ignored.
